title: Being able to choose map pin colors (similar to item colors)
excerpt: I’m using Monday.com as a CRM.  I love the mapping feature where I can place pins on the maps.   I’d like to request the ability to place (different color pins) or the ability to choose a map pin color to the map.   I al…

posts.author: dale.fahrney (Dale Fahrney)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m using Monday.com as a CRM. I love the mapping feature where I can place pins on the maps. I’d like to request the ability to place (different color pins) or the ability to choose a map pin color to the map. I also like to be able to place multiple pins per account. Thanks for looking at this request.

posts.author: cdeberry (Cheryl DeBerry)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree - I made a location column and it created a map, but for the life of me I can’t figure out why it made the pins the different colors it did. They don’t match the status columns, or group colors, etc.

posts.author: ashleybr (Ashley Ralph)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree - conditional colors for map view makes sense. It would be nice if the map reflected a status column color of our choosing

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We’re super excited to share our new app with the world, Map View Pro.

It allows you to customize the color of the pins on the map (fe.: color them based on a status value) and choose what information is displayed when you click a pin.

Read more on our docs on what colums we support as source for the Pin Color and what columns we support for the Info Window.

You can try it for free for 14 days here, if you’re missing anything, do let us know!

Best,

Maarten
